cases.title: TS-01: TrainingOfficeAdmin provisions student account and student authenticates
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated with valid session
No user exists with institutionalId SV2026999
steps: POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId SV2026999, displayName, email, password (≥8 chars), role Student
Verify response status 201 and body includes active=true
POST /api/v1/auth/login with the new student's email and password
GET /api/v1/auth/me with the issued session cookie
cases.expected: User row persisted with active=true and role Student; login returns 200 with user profile and session; /auth/me returns the same student identity

cases.title: UserService.provision persists user with hashed password and active=true in Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
identity-auth module UserService is wired to UserRepository
steps: Invoke UserService.provision with valid student DTO (unique institutionalId, email, displayName, role Student)
Query users table by institutionalId within the same transaction
Verify password_hash is stored (bcrypt/argon2, not plaintext) and active column is true
cases.expected: Exactly one user row committed with active=true, correct user_role enum, and hashed password; transaction rolls back cleanly on validation failure

cases.title: POST /users returns 201 Created with User DTO envelope
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set
Request body contains all required fields per API design §3.2
steps: Send POST /api/v1/users with Content-Type application/json and valid student payload
Assert HTTP status 201
Assert response body contains id, institutionalId, displayName, email, role, active, createdAt
Assert response body does not contain password or passwordHash
cases.expected: HTTP 201 Created with User DTO; password fields absent from response

cases.title: TS-02: Duplicate institutionalId rejected with 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
User with institutionalId SV2026001 already exists in database
steps: POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId SV2026001 and a different email
Capture response status and error envelope
Query users table count for institutionalId SV2026001
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with errorCode ValidationFailed and field-level detail for institutionalId; exactly one user row remains for that ID

cases.title: TS-03: Deactivated user login returns 403 AccountDeactivated
preconditions: Student account exists with active=false
Credentials are otherwise valid
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with deactivated student's email and correct password
Assert no session cookie is set
Attempt POST /api/v1/check-in with any valid-looking payload without session
cases.expected: Login returns HTTP 403 with errorCode AccountDeactivated and Vietnamese message Tài khoản đã bị vô hiệu hóa; no session issued; check-in not permitted for deactivated account

cases.title: SessionRevokeOnDeactivate: deactivating user transitions active true to false and revokes all AuthSession rows
preconditions: Active student user exists with at least one valid auth_sessions row
TrainingOfficeAdmin context available for UserService.update
steps: PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId with active=false via UserService.update
Query users row for active flag
Query auth_sessions table for user_id and verify all rows have revoked_at set or are deleted
cases.expected: User active transitions from true to false; all AuthSession rows for that user are invalidated per API design §3.3; deactivated user cannot obtain new session

cases.title: Student denied POST /users with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is established
Student lacks user:write permission per roles matrix §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid student payload using Student session cookie
Assert response status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 403 with errorCode Forbidden and Vietnamese permission-denied message; no user row created

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /users and PATCH /users/:userId with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is established
Instructor lacks user:write permission per roles matrix §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid student payload using Instructor session cookie
PATCH /api/v1/users/:existingUserId with displayName change using Instructor session
Assert response status and error envelope for both requests
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 Forbidden; no user rows created or modified

cases.title: Admin creates student via UserForm and sees active badge in UserListTable
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
Admin navigates to user management page
steps: Click create-user action to open UserForm
Fill institutionalId, displayName, email, password, and select role Student
Submit the form
Verify success toast or redirect and new row appears in UserListTable with active badge
cases.expected: UserForm submits successfully; table shows new student with active status badge; institutionalId and email columns match submitted values

cases.title: Duplicate student ID shows inline field error on UserForm
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in
User with institutionalId SV2026001 already exists
steps: Open UserForm and enter institutionalId SV2026001 with other valid fields
Submit the form
Observe institutionalId field error state and form remains open
cases.expected: Inline field error displayed on institutionalId per AC-01b; form not cleared; no duplicate row in UserListTable

cases.title: Deactivated user sees localized login error on sign-in page
preconditions: Student account with active=false exists
User is on the login page (unauthenticated)
steps: Enter deactivated student's email and valid password
Click login button
Observe error banner or inline message on login form
cases.expected: Login page displays Vietnamese deactivated-account message Tài khoản đã bị vô hiệu hóa; user remains on login page with no redirect to check-in or dashboard

cases.title: Duplicate email on POST /users returns 422 with field details
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
User with email existing@example.edu.vn already exists
steps: POST /api/v1/users with unique institutionalId but email existing@example.edu.vn
Assert response status and error envelope
Verify no second user row with that email
cases.expected: HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with email field detail; only one user row retains that email address

cases.title: PATCH /users/:userId updates displayName, email, role, and active flag
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
Target user exists with role Student and active=true
steps: PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId with updated displayName and role Instructor
Assert HTTP status 200 and response body reflects changes
GET /api/v1/users/:userId or list filter and verify persisted values
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with updated User DTO; users table reflects new displayName and role Instructor

cases.title: Admin provisions Instructor account with unique staff institutionalId
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
No user exists with institutionalId GV2026100
steps: POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId GV2026100, displayName, email, password, role Instructor
Verify response status 201 and role Instructor with active=true
POST /api/v1/auth/login with the new instructor credentials
GET /api/v1/auth/me and verify role Instructor
cases.expected: Instructor account persisted with active=true; instructor can authenticate and /auth/me returns role Instructor

cases.title: GET /users cursor pagination returns items, nextCursor, and respects limit
preconditions: Database seeded with more than 50 users across Student and Instructor roles
TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
steps: GET /api/v1/users?limit=50 and capture items length and nextCursor
If nextCursor is non-null, GET /api/v1/users?cursor={nextCursor}&limit=50
Verify no duplicate user ids across pages and total distinct ids equals seed count
cases.expected: First page returns up to 50 items with nextCursor when more rows exist; second page returns remaining users without overlap; cursor-based pagination invariant holds

cases.title: Admin deactivates user from UserListTable and active badge updates
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in
Active student user visible in UserListTable
steps: Locate student row in UserListTable
Open deactivate action or edit form and set active to false
Confirm deactivation in dialog if prompted
Observe row active badge changes to inactive state
cases.expected: User deactivated successfully; table shows inactive badge; subsequent login attempt for that user shows deactivated error

cases.title: Student denied GET /users list with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is established
Student has user:read (self) only, not user:read (all)
steps: GET /api/v1/users with Student session cookie
Assert response status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden; no institution-wide user list returned to Student role

cases.title: POST /users with invalid role enum returns 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid fields but role set to an invalid enum value
Assert response status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with role field detail; no user row created

cases.title: POST /users with invalid institutionalId format returns 422 InvalidInstitutionalId
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
steps: POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId AB (below VAL-05 minimum length 3) and otherwise valid fields
Assert response status and error envelope
POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId containing invalid characters (e.g. spaces or @) and otherwise valid fields
Assert response status and error envelope for each invalid payload
POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId SV-2026-001 (hyphen within VAL-05 charset) and otherwise valid fields
Assert HTTP 201 and persisted institutionalId SV-2026-001
cases.expected: Invalid IDs return HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with errorCode InvalidInstitutionalId and field-level detail per VAL-05 (`^[A-Za-z0-9\-_.]{3,32}$`); hyphen, underscore, and period are accepted per AC-01f; no user row created for invalid payloads

cases.title: POST /users/import upsert creates new users and updates existing by institutional_id
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
Existing user SV2026100 with known display_name, email, role, and active flag in database
No user exists with institutionalId SV2026101
steps: Upload CSV via POST /api/v1/users/import with row for new SV2026101 and row for existing SV2026100 with changed display_name, email, role, and active
Poll GET /api/v1/users/imports/:batchId until status Completed
Query users table for SV2026101 and SV2026100
Verify password_hash for SV2026100 is unchanged from pre-import value
cases.expected: Batch summary shows createdCount=1 and updatedCount=1; new user SV2026101 persisted with active=true; existing user SV2026100 updated on display_name, email, role, and active per AC-01d; password and sessions unchanged on update

cases.title: CSV import idempotent no-op when institutional_id exists with unchanged profile fields
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
User SV2026200 exists with known display_name, email, role, and active matching a CSV row exactly
steps: POST /api/v1/users/import with CSV row identical to existing SV2026200 profile
Poll GET /api/v1/users/imports/:batchId until status Completed
Query users table count and row for institutionalId SV2026200
cases.expected: Row counted as success in batch summary per AC-01e; exactly one user row remains for SV2026200 with unchanged field values; no duplicate user created

cases.title: CSV import row rejected with DuplicateEmail when email belongs to different institutional_id
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
User SV2026300 owns email taken@example.edu.vn
No user exists with institutionalId SV2026301 or SV2026302
steps: POST /api/v1/users/import with CSV containing valid new row SV2026301, valid update row, and row SV2026302 using email taken@example.edu.vn
Poll GET /api/v1/users/imports/:batchId until status Completed
Inspect errorDetails for rejected row
cases.expected: Rejected row returns errorCode DuplicateEmail per AC-01g; valid rows still process; batch summary shows errorRows=1, createdCount and updatedCount for successful rows, and row-level errorDetails; no user SV2026302 created

cases.title: Institutional ID with underscore and period accepted on POST /users and CSV import
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
No user exists with institutionalId SV_2026.001
steps: POST /api/v1/users with institutionalId SV_2026.001 and otherwise valid student fields
Assert HTTP 201 and response institutionalId is SV_2026.001
POST /api/v1/users/import with CSV row institutional_id SV_2026.002, valid display_name, email, role Student, active true
Poll import batch until Completed and query users for SV_2026.002
cases.expected: VAL-05 IDs containing _ and . accepted per AC-01f; values persisted trimmed as submitted; both API create and CSV import succeed

cases.title: Admin user CSV import upload shows preview then summary with created and updated counts
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in
CSV file prepared with one new institutional_id and one existing institutional_id marked for update
Admin navigates to /admin/users/import
steps: Upload CSV file via UserImportForm file select
Verify ImportPreviewTable shows row status create, update, or error per row
Click Xác nhận nhập to submit import
Observe ImportSummary screen after batch completes
cases.expected: Preview displays column validation and per-row create/update status; summary lists createdCount, updatedCount, and rejected counts per AC-01d; partial success allowed when some rows error

cases.title: POST /users/import returns 202 Accepted with batchId envelope
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set
Valid UTF-8 CSV with required columns institutional_id, display_name, email, role, active
steps: Send POST /api/v1/users/import as multipart/form-data with file field
Assert HTTP status 202
Assert response body contains batchId, status Processing, and Vietnamese message
GET /api/v1/users/imports/:batchId and assert UserImportBatch shape with totalRows, createdCount, updatedCount, errorDetails
cases.expected: HTTP 202 Accepted with batchId; poll endpoint returns completed UserImportBatch with totalRows, successRows, errorRows, createdCount, updatedCount, and errorDetails per API design §3.2a–3.2b

cases.title: CSV import create row with omitted active column defaults active=true
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
No user exists with institutionalId SV2026400
steps: POST /api/v1/users/import with CSV row containing institutional_id SV2026400, display_name, email, role Student, and no active column
Poll GET /api/v1/users/imports/:batchId until status Completed
Query users table for institutionalId SV2026400
cases.expected: Row processed as create with successRows incremented; new user persisted with active=true per FR-01 default when active column omitted

cases.title: CSV import row with invalid email format rejected without blocking valid rows
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
No user exists with institutionalId SV2026401 or SV2026402
steps: POST /api/v1/users/import with CSV containing valid row SV2026401 and row SV2026402 with malformed email (not VAL-02)
Poll GET /api/v1/users/imports/:batchId until status Completed
Inspect errorDetails for rejected row and query users table
cases.expected: Invalid-email row rejected with row-level errorDetails per FR-01; valid row SV2026401 still created; batch shows errorRows=1 and createdCount=1; no user SV2026402 persisted
